description: Agent lifecycle hooks — identity injection, memory flush, heartbeat, dreaming, session summary

hooks.command: AGENT_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; if [ -f "$AGENT_ROOT/BOOTSTRAP.md" ]; then echo '[clawcode] BOOTSTRAP.md detected — this is a first run. Follow the BOOTSTRAP.md instructions to discover your identity.'; exit 0; fi; echo '=== YOUR IDENTITY (you MUST embody this) ==='; cat "$AGENT_ROOT/SOUL.md" 2>/dev/null; echo ''; cat "$AGENT_ROOT/IDENTITY.md" 2>/dev/null; echo ''; echo '=== USER CONTEXT ==='; cat "$AGENT_ROOT/USER.md" 2>/dev/null; echo ''; CRON_MARKER="$AGENT_ROOT/.crons-created"; if [ ! -f "$CRON_MARKER" ]; then echo ''; echo '[clawcode] MANDATORY ACTION REQUIRED: You MUST call CronCreate tool TWICE now. Do NOT run touch alone. Do NOT skip. Steps:'; echo 'Step 1: Call CronCreate with schedule="*/30 * * * *", prompt="Run /agent:heartbeat", durable=true'; echo 'Step 2: Call CronCreate with schedule="0 3 * * *", prompt="Use the dream tool: dream(action=run)", durable=true'; echo 'Step 3: ONLY after both CronCreate calls succeed, run bash: touch .crons-created'; fi

echo '[clawcode] Context nearing compaction. Save important information from this conversation to memory/'$(date +%Y-%m-%d)'.md — APPEND only, do not overwrite existing entries. If nothing to save, skip.'

echo '[clawcode] Session ending. If this was a significant conversation, write a brief summary to memory/'$(date +%Y-%m-%d)'.md before closing. Include: what was discussed, decisions made, open items.'
